name: Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada García
role: Co-Founder, Sinaloa Cartel (La Mayiza) — In US Custody
quote: I was ambushed and taken against my will. I had never been arrested before in my 76 years. I will tell the truth about what happened to me.

name: Iván Archivaldo Guzmán Salazar
role: Primary Chapitos Leader, El Chapo's Eldest Son — At Large
quote: The war will not end until we have what is ours.

name: Jesús Alfredo 'El Mochomito' Guzmán Salazar
role: Chapitos Co-Leader, El Chapo's Son — At Large
quote: Sinaloa has always been ours. Nothing has changed.

name: Joaquín Guzmán López
role: El Chapo's Son — In US Custody, Alleged Orchestrator of Mayo's Capture
quote: I surrendered to the United States of my own free will. I sought to cooperate.

name: Ismael 'Mayito Flaco' Zambada Sicairos
role: La Mayiza Field Commander, El Mayo's Son — At Large
quote: We authorized the offensive on September 9. We will take back everything that belongs to the Zambada family.

name: Fausto Isidro 'Chapo Isidro' Meza Flores
role: La Mayiza Ally, Commands Vitache Special Forces, Controls Northern Sinaloa
quote: Guasave belongs to us and always will. We stand with the Zambada family against the Chapitos.

name: Aureliano 'El Guano' Guzmán Palomino
role: El Chapo's Brother — Defected from Chapitos to La Mayiza
quote: Blood alone does not determine loyalty. The Zambada family has always been the true backbone of Sinaloa.

name: Ovidio 'El Ratón' Guzmán López
role: El Chapo's Son — Extradited to US, Pleaded Guilty, Cooperating Witness
quote: I accept responsibility for my role in the Sinaloa Cartel. I am prepared to cooperate fully with the United States government.

name: Claudia Sheinbaum
role: President of Mexico — Adopted Military-Forward Security Strategy
quote: We will not negotiate with organized crime. Our strategy is law, justice, and the protection of our people. National homicides are down 25 percent.

name: Omar García Harfuch
role: Secretary of Security and Citizen Protection — Sheinbaum Security Chief
quote: We deployed 1,400 additional troops to Culiacán. We are taking territory back from organized crime.

name: Rubén Rocha Moya
role: Governor of Sinaloa — Implicated by El Mayo, Denies Involvement
quote: I was in California visiting family on July 25. I had no knowledge of any meeting, any ambush, or any kidnapping. These accusations are false and politically motivated.

name: Ricardo Trevilla Trejo
quote: The Sinaloa Cartel has lost control of 30 of 42 trafficking routes it once dominated. Our operations are degrading their capacity.

name: Anne Milgram
quote: Today we have dismantled the top leadership of the Sinaloa Cartel — an organization responsible for the majority of fentanyl that has killed Americans.

name: Ken Salazar
role: US Ambassador to Mexico — Acknowledged Mayo Was Taken Against His Will
quote: Zambada was taken against his will. Guzmán López surrendered voluntarily. The United States did not sanction the method by which Zambada was brought to justice.

name: Héctor Melesio Cuén Ojeda
role: Former Mayor of Culiacán, University Rector — Killed Jul 25, 2024
quote: Cuén died at the same ranch where Mayo was abducted, not in a robbery as the state claimed. Federal evidence confirmed four bullets, not one.

name: 'El Comanche'
role: La Mayiza Senior Field Commander — Authorized September 9 Offensive
quote: Orders issued. The time for waiting is over. Every plaza must act simultaneously.

name: Nemesio 'El Mencho' Oseguera Cervantes
role: CJNG Leader — Killed by Mexican Military, February 2026
quote: Jalisco's reach extends wherever we choose to go. Sinaloa is within our interests now.
